message:
fix(safety): harden forensic snapshots, integer overflow, and deterministic replay

Core safety improvements across the engine:
- Use content-addressed forensic snapshots with actual extension state instead
  of synthetic placeholders for stronger integrity guarantees
- Replace panic-prone integer arithmetic with saturating_add() for receipt ID
  generation to prevent silent overflow
- Add IbltCell::is_zero() helper for cleaner anti-entropy cell state checks
- Strengthen deterministic replay and serialization paths

Additional hardening across subsystems:
- causal_replay, deterministic_replay, deterministic_serde: replay correctness
- e2e_harness, execution_cell: test infrastructure improvements
- fleet_convergence, fleet_immune_protocol: fleet safety paths
- forensic_replayer, guardplane_calibration: forensic/guard plane fixes
- hook_effect_contract, monitor_scheduler: scheduling safety
- policy_controller, region_lifecycle: lifecycle management
- revocation_chain, safe_mode_fallback, safety_decision_router: safety subsystem
- supervision, cut_line_automation: operational reliability

All changes maintain the codebase unsafe-forbidden guarantee and
deterministic replay properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
